faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Dyker Heights home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include small piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large black or red-black ants especially during spring months. You may also notice winged ants (swarmers) near windows. Our free inspection can confirm carpenter ant activity and identify all nesting sites in your home.

faqs.question: What affects the cost of carpenter ant control in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Pricing from $350 to $2,000 depends on factors including the size of your property, severity of infestation, number of colonies present, and accessibility of nesting sites. Single-family homes with minor infestations typically cost $350-$600, while larger properties or severe infestations with multiple colonies may require more extensive treatment reaching $1,500-$2,000. We provide transparent quotes after our inspection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Dyker Heights residents. Carpenter ants can cause significant structural damage over time, so prompt treatment is essential. Our local technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to perform an inspection and begin treatment immediately if needed.

faqs.question: Are your carpenter ant treatments safe for families and pets in Dyker Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and eco-friendly treatment methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We can also offer green and organic treatment options upon request. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions and re-entry times, though most treatments allow you to remain home during service.
